subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! Upon thee be My glory! We have hearkened unto thy call and have answered thee through this luminous leaf which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و ورقتی علیک بهائی انا سمعنا ندائک اجبناک بهذه الورقه النورآء التی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for the departed, @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @love of God, @eulogies; reminiscences
